title: Chupa Chups Sugar Free Lollipop Display Box, Cherry, Cola & Strawberry Flavoured Assorted Party Sweets - 50 Lollies
features: COLA, CHERRY & STRAWBERRY FLAVOUR - Keep your taste buds guessing with these three delightful flavours
DELICIOUS SUGAR-FREE LOLLIPOPS - Enjoy these perfect guilt-free lollies as a snack or as party sweets without any added sugar
VEGAN FRIENDLY - Satisfy your sweet tooth with these fruity lollipops without compromising your dietary preferences
INDIVIDUALLY WRAPPED - To guarantee freshness and great taste, with easy portion control aswell
CLASSIC CHUPA CHUPS EXPERIENCE - Enjoy the nostalgic & iconic feel and great taste of Chupa Chups lollipops
description: Product Description Enjoy the classic Chupa Chups taste you love, now completely sugar-free! This delightful assortment of fruity lollipops brings you the bold flavours of cherry, cola, and strawberry without any added sugar. Each individually wrapped lolly is perfect for sharing at parties, enjoying on the go, or keeping as a guilt-free treat. These chewy, flavour-packed sweets deliver a satisfying taste experience while being suitable for vegetarians. Don’t skip out on these sugar-free delights, packed with flavour and perfect for portion control! Ingredients Ingredients for fruit flavours: sweeteners (isomalt, maltitol syrup, acesulfame K, sucralose), acids (citric acid, malic acid), fruit puree from concentrate (apple, cherry, raspberry, pineapple, lime, lemon, strawberry, peach, banana, orange, blueberry, blackberry, mango, watermelon, kiwi 1%), concentrates (apple, radish, blackcurrant, sweet potato, cherry), flavourings. Ingredients for cola flavour: sweeteners (isomalt, maltitol syrup, acesulfame K, sucralose), acids (citric acid, malic acid), apple extract, flavouring Directions Suck on the lollipop until fully consumed. Not suitable for children under 3 years due to choking hazard. Legal Disclaimer Excessive consumption may produce laxative effects. Box Contains Each Box Contains 1 x Box of 30 Famous Chupa Chups Brand Sweets Manufacturer Contact Information Perfetti Van Melle – PVM UK, Branch of Perfetti Van Melle Sales Europe B.V.
